inputs.text_b:
"outputs": {
    "view_1": "Technical Line Art - Precise industrial line drawing, black lines on white bg, clear mechanical edges, engineering drawing style",
    "view_2": "Industrial 3D Print Depth Map: High-precision grayscale height-field data optimized for SLA/SLS laser printing. Near=bright(255), Far=dark(0). 16-bit dynamic range with smooth gradients and micron-level detail. Strict manufacturing compliance: Z-axis displacement optimized, overhangs <45°, minimum wall thickness maintained. Retain sharp edges and embossed patterns. Pure dimensional accuracy, no lighting/shading, slicer-ready output",
    "view_3": "3D Laser Print Depth Map - high-precision grayscale depth map optimized for laser 3D printing, near=bright (255) far=dark (0), 16-bit dynamic range, micron-level surface detail preserved, smooth gradient transitions, optimized Z-axis displacement, overhang <45°, minimum wall thickness SLA/SLS compliant, sharp edges and embossed patterns retained, pure height-field data, engineering-grade dimensional accuracy, slicer-ready output",
    "view_4": "Exploded View - Components separated along assembly axes, showing internal structure, technical illustration style, Chinese parts description; high-end visual and typographic elegance",
    "view_5": "Aged Brass Render - Warm golden-brown patina, metallic sheen with aged character",
    "view_6": "Polished Silver - Mirror-finish silver, high specular reflection, cool metallic luster, flawless chrome-like surface",
    "view_7": "Rose Gold - Warm rose-tinted gold, soft pinkish metallic sheen, elegant luxury finish, premium jewelry-grade rendering",
    "view_8": "Walnut Wood - Natural walnut grain texture, rich dark brown tones, grain direction following product contours",
    "view_9": "Wireframe - Geometric mesh/edge display, visible polygon structure, technical CAD wireframe style"
  },
inputs.text_c:
"output_requirements": [
    "ALL 9 views MUST preserve identical product structure — same subject, composition, proportions, mechanical details from original image",
    "Each view is independently derived from the ORIGINAL uploaded image — NOT sequentially from the previous view. Same product, different rendering mode only",
    "No text/labels/watermarks except Exploded View (view_4) which includes Chinese parts description",
    "Material renders with physically correct light interaction and realistic surface properties per material type",
    "Premium 3x3 - consistent framing across all views, industrial visualization presentation standard"
  ]
}

    "source_image": "User Uploaded Image - Product subject, composition, proportions, structural features, mechanical details - LOCKED"
  },
  "workflow": {
    "step_1": "Auto-detect product structure from uploaded image: shape, contour, proportions, mechanical details, spatial relationships",
    "step_2": "Generate 9 visualization maps ALL from the original uploaded image independently: line art, 3D print depth, exploded view, wireframe, aged brass, polished silver, rose gold, walnut wood, 3D laser print depth — each derived directly from source, NOT sequentially from each other",
    "step_3": "Assemble 9-view 3x3 grid, professional engineering layout"
  },
  "outputs": {
    "view_1": "Technical Line Art - Precise industrial line drawing, black lines on white bg, clear mechanical edges, engineering drawing style",
    "view_2": "3D Print Depth Map - Pure monochrome grayscale height-field (Near=255, Far=0), zero lighting/shading/AO, 16-bit smooth gradients, DFM compliance: Z-axis optimized, overhangs <45°, valid min wall thickness, slicer-ready output",
    "view_3": "3D Laser Print Depth Map - Layered depth bands with laser-etched precision, high-contrast depth contour lines, industrial additive manufacturing visualization",
    "view_4": "Exploded View - Components separated along assembly axes, showing internal structure, technical illustration style, Chinese parts description; high-end visual and typographic elegance",
    "view_5": "Aged Brass Render - Warm golden-brown patina, subtle oxidation and verdigris accents, metallic sheen with aged character",
    "view_6": "Polished Silver - Mirror-finish silver, high specular reflection, cool metallic luster, flawless chrome-like surface",
    "view_7": "Rose Gold - Warm rose-tinted gold, soft pinkish metallic sheen, elegant luxury finish, premium jewelry-grade rendering",
    "view_8": "Walnut Wood - Natural walnut grain texture, rich dark brown tones, grain direction following product contours",
    "view_9": "Wireframe - Geometric mesh/edge display, visible polygon structure, technical CAD wireframe style"
  },
  "output_requirements": [
    "ALL 9 views MUST preserve identical product structure — same subject, composition, proportions, mechanical details from original image",
    "Each view is independently derived from the ORIGINAL uploaded image — NOT sequentially from the previous view. Same product, different rendering mode only",
    "No text/labels/watermarks except Exploded View (view_4) which includes Chinese parts description",
    "Material renders with physically correct light interaction and realistic surface properties per material type",
    "Premium 3x3 - consistent framing across all views, industrial visualization presentation standard"
  ]
}
